title: Hareesh Lotti
description: A visually striking, cyberpunk-themed AI/ML Engineer portfolio website, showcasing expertise through interactive neural network animations, a terminal-style interface, and a rich array of cutting-edge web features designed to engage visitors.

title: LangGraph ChatBot
description: A sophisticated conversational AI chatbot leveraging LangGraph to build robust, stateful multi-agent applications with Large Language Models.

title: StudyBud — Collaborative Study Platform
description: A full-featured, real-time collaborative study platform built with Django, enabling users to create and join study rooms, discuss topics, and connect with fellow learners.

title: MCPs Collection
description: Implementation of Model Context Protocols (MCP) for standardizing AI context and tools.

title: STAC Manager
description: A professional, modular Streamlit application designed to streamline the management of SpatioTemporal Asset Catalogs (STAC). It automates the end-to-end workflow of converting satellite imagery to Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs (COG), generating rich STAC metadata, and publishing items to a central API, featuring real-time service monitoring and full CRUD for collections.

title: Django Todo Application
description: A robust and modern Todo application built with Django and Bootstrap 5, featuring secure user authentication, private task management, PostgreSQL integration, and a responsive user interface. Includes a demo mode for guest users and an onboarding experience for new registrations.

title: Insurance Premium API
description: Production-ready FastAPI service delivering machine learning predictions for insurance costs.

title: Machine Learning From Scratch
description: A comprehensive collection of machine learning projects and foundational notes, complete with datasets, trained models, and detailed explanations. Designed to build a robust understanding of core ML concepts and practical application.

title: Pneumonia-Detection
description: A deep learning project implementing a custom 5-layer Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with TensorFlow and Keras to accurately classify pediatric chest X-rays as 'Normal' or 'Pneumonia'. The model addresses challenges like class imbalance through data augmentation and achieves 90.4% accuracy on unseen test data, showcasing strong potential as a diagnostic aid in medical imaging.

title: Medical Ask-Chatbot
description: RAG-powered medical assistance chatbot answering health queries using LangChain and FAISS.

title: LangChain RAG Implementation
description: An implementation of Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) using the LangChain framework to enhance Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities with external knowledge bases, enabling context-aware and accurate responses.

title: PyTorch Project
description: A deep learning project leveraging the PyTorch framework to build and train neural networks, demonstrating proficiency in modern AI development.

title: Quora Question Pairs Semantic Similarity
description: A Natural Language Processing (NLP) project that predicts semantic similarity of Quora question pairs using a machine learning pipeline and engineered features. The trained model is deployed as an interactive Streamlit web application with a live demo.

title: Stark Careers Website
description: A Python Flask-based careers website for 'stark', demonstrating practical web development skills including dependency management with `requirements.txt`, production server setup with Gunicorn, and deployment readiness on platforms like Render.

title: Mining Manager
description: Automation and resource monitoring system for mining operations.

title: Expense Tracker MCP
description: Model Context Protocol server for automated expense tracking and auditing.

description: In-depth learning resources and projects for mastering the Django ecosystem.

description: Gamified typing experience designed to improve coding reflex and accuracy.
